findings.problem: Sanitization via moral safety valve: after Anika names that Ravi prioritized motion over her safety, the scene quickly pivots to Ravi's grief explanation and operational planning, reducing sustained discomfort and accountability for the coercive push-through that caused the collapse.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise confrontation and landing beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:443, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:451, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:497 so consequence lands before explanation: keep Anika's accusation active, require Ravi to name a concrete harmful action from this chapter, and stage one immediate behavior change rather than moving straight to optimization language.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:443-507 includes both (1) Ravi explicitly naming one specific harmful choice from the match-day sequence and (2) one immediate concrete concession/boundary tied to that admission; FAIL if the passage returns to shared planning or mutual softening before those two elements appear.

findings.problem: After the collapse (the chapter's causal peak), narrative bandwidth shifts to extended clinic/waiting-room color, while the central father-daughter consequence arrives late and compressed. This weakens payoff to the chapter objective/consequence arc.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebalance post-collapse pacing in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:313 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:343 by trimming incidental portraits, then expand decision-bearing fallout at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:429 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:497 so the chapter ends on a concrete changed condition, not only mood.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:313-507 contains at least one explicit immediate change to household/training authority before the final paragraph and that change is causally tied to the diagnosis; FAIL if the section remains mostly logistical color plus unresolved talk.

findings.problem: Authority voices in the medical block converge toward the same polished corrective cadence, and Ravi briefly slips into chart-style diction ("Repetitive load, acute collapse") that blurs his established procedural-but-human register.
findings.rewrite_direction: Differentiate dialogue rhythms at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:251, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:273, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:351, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:419 by giving each speaker a distinct syntax/word-choice profile; rewrite Ravi's intake line at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:319 into stress-appropriate spoken language rather than pseudo-chart shorthand.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:251-419 gives Denise, Dr. Mehta, the nurse, and Ravi at least one line each that is not swappable without sounding out-of-character, and Ravi's intake statement reads as spoken stress language; FAIL if the block still reads as one shared institutional voice.

findings.problem: Mechanical repetition of Anika's numeric stress-tell (pain scores, countdowns, debt figures, score litanies) appears so frequently that the interior register starts to feel over-literalized rather than evolving.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:45, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:135, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:177, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:323, keep only the highest-leverage numeric beats and replace the rest with non-numeric interior signals aligned with style-bible sensory bias (touch/sound/spatial pressure).
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text uses no more than one explicit numeric self-regulation beat in each major scene unit (pre-match, between-games, collapse aftermath, clinic wait) and includes at least one replacement interior beat per unit that is sensory rather than arithmetic; FAIL if counting/numbering still dominates every transition.

findings.problem: A recurring introduction formula (minor character + accessory detail + quirky micro-habit) appears well beyond twice and becomes a prose tic, diluting focus during high-stakes progression.
findings.rewrite_direction: Prune repeated thumbnail construction at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:159, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:315, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:329, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:417; reserve two-detail portraits for plot-critical figures (e.g., Denise/Dr. Mehta) and cap one-off figures to one salient marker.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised chapter limits two-detail incidental-character thumbnails to three or fewer instances and avoids back-to-back intros using the same accessory-plus-habit template; FAIL if the template still repeats across most scene transitions.

findings.problem: Telegraphic clipping recurs in key action/introspection beats (noun-fragment and command-fragment bursts), conflicting with the constitution's ban on function-word stripping as a default rhythm device.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast clipped beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:151, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:153, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:191 into short but grammatically complete sentences while preserving urgency; smooth scoreboard fragments at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:177 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:187 into full-syntax transitions.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised versions of the cited spans contain explicit subject-verb structure and no stand-alone imperative fragments in narration; FAIL if clipped fragment chains remain the primary pacing device in those beats.

summary: Chapter 8 lands core plot beats and has strong embodied injury detail, but it does not clear pass-level craft rigor: consequence is partially cushioned by a moral safety valve, post-collapse pacing diffuses central fallout, dialogue idiolects converge in the medical block, and repeated prose templates (numeric stress loops, incidental-character thumbnails, clipped fragment rhythm) flatten distinctiveness. No canonical continuity contradiction was detected against outline/continuity_sheet.json.
